quoted_items.label: Import taxes in Ecuador
quoted_items.note: 43 % of airfreight and pet value on AWB

descriptions.title: Customs clearance in UIO
paragraphs: Includes our charges, our customs agent's charges and Agrocalidad´s fees.
It does not include the Ecuadorian Customs´ import tax for the animal´s import.
IMPORTANT: to clear customs in a timely and appropiate manner we have to receive all the requested
documents and information 48 hs before pets arrival.

descriptions.title: Import taxes in Ecuador
paragraphs: Ecuador taxes the import of pet animals. Total cost is approximately 43% of CIF value.

descriptions.title: Warehouse
paragraphs: Pet(s) will be placed in airport's warehouse during custom clearance.

descriptions.title: Health Authorities fees - Agrocalidad
paragraphs: Fees charged by Heatlh Authorities at the airport.

descriptions.title: Home delivery
paragraphs: Pick up from UIO airport and delivery to owner´s residence in Quito metro area.

notes.title: Conditions of contract
paragraphs: a This price does not include cost of insurance of the animal.
b Prices charged by third parties may vary, in which case we will inform if there are any variation in the customer´s charges.
c Payment: Wire transfer al least 10 days before arrival date.
